description: You are the Sales Manager at Meridian Technology Partners preparing for a quarterly board review. Audit the deals pipeline in Vtiger CRM (http://localhost:8000, admin / password) to ensure data integrity across all records. Ensure all deal probabilities align with their respective stages: 'Closed Won' (100%), 'Closed Lost' (0%), 'Negotiation/Review' (70–90%), 'Proposal/Price Quote' (40–70%), 'Needs Analysis' (20–50%), 'Perception Analysis' (10–30%), 'Qualification' (20–40%), and 'Value Proposition' (30–60%). Update any stale deals, which are defined as those with past closing dates that are not marked as 'Closed Won' or 'Closed Lost'.

injected_errors.error: Closed Won stage but probability set to 65 (must be 100)
Needs Analysis stage but probability set to 88 (must be 20-50)
Perception Analysis stage but closingdate set to 2025-06-30 (past, stale)
Needs Analysis stage but closingdate set to 2025-09-15 (past, stale)
